caption: A night-vision scene shows a dark, grassy outdoor area featuring a step ladder and a small boat. A bright, cone-shaped light source hangs directly above the ladder, casting a glow on the immediate area. The ladder stands upright on the grass, and a small white container sits at its base. To the right of the ladder, a dark rowing boat rests on the ground. The background contains dark silhouettes of trees and foliage. Across the sequence of frames, the setting remains static with no people present. The only subtle change is the slight movement of a plant's leaves in the lower right foreground, suggesting a light breeze. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the scene.
